meaning: n.生面团,<美俚> 钱,金钱
examples: If the dough is sticky, add more flour.
Add more water until the dough is workable.
Add some raisins to the dough.
It is fantastic for people-watching while munching on the famous Mumbai bhelpuri (fried, savoury rounds of dough).
After a night in the refrigerator, sure enough, the dough was easy to work with.
